text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Formulary File Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 2.2 4 

DISEASE 

LABEL: Condition 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the FDA-approved indication for which the drug (represented by the FRMLRY_RX_ID) is 
considered on-formulary. 

SHORT NAME: DISEASE 

LONG NAME: DISEASE 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 100 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: Text description (e.g., CROHN DISEASE and ARTHRITIS, PSORIATIC) 

COMMENT: Starting in 2020,
